old_value: {"id":"chai-2oa","title":"Keyed reconciliation silently corrupts DOM when keys are duplicated","description":"`diff_children_keyed` uses `Map[String, (Int, VNode)]`, so duplicate keys overwrite previous entries. This can leave old duplicate-key nodes untracked and never removed, resulting in stale DOM nodes and nondeterministic updates.\n\nFix direction: validate uniqueness of keys in both old and new keyed lists and abort on duplicates with a precise message (`duplicate key: ...`).","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-3zq","title":"Unmounted component handles retain live dispatch closures","description":"When a component slot is removed, `Handle.dispatch` is not invalidated. Parents that keep a handle can still `Cmd::send` into an unmounted child loop, retaining model/queue closures and causing ghost updates + memory retention.\n\nFix direction: track handles per slot and set them to no-op when the slot is removed, or gate dispatch by slot liveness.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-ezb","title":"SPA link helper breaks modified-click/new-tab browser behavior","description":"`link()` always calls `prevent_default()` on click and dispatches `on_nav`. This blocks ctrl/cmd-click, shift-click, middle-click, and other native navigation semantics.\n\nFix direction: intercept only primary unmodified clicks targeting same browsing context; otherwise allow native browser behavior.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: Implemented keyed/non-keyed mode-switch fallback replacement in diff_children
Added duplicate-key guards for old/new keyed children in reconciliation
Unmount now invalidates component handles with one-time warning dispatch
link() now intercepts only plain primary same-tab clicks via conditional event dispatch
{"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-y6y","title":"Reduce queue copy churn in runtime dispatch loops","description":"`app.boot`, component dispatch loops, and pending init command draining repeatedly call `copy()` + `clear()` on arrays each cycle. Under bursty message loads this adds avoidable allocations and throughput overhead.\n\nFix direction: use double-buffer queue swapping or index-based draining to preserve reentrancy without cloning full arrays each cycle.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:36Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-9qj","title":"README on_key_down prevent_default docs mismatch runtime signature","description":"README says `prevent_default=true` for `Sub::on_key_down`, but API expects a predicate `(String) -\u003e Bool`. This mismatch can mislead users and cause compile-time friction.\n\nFix direction: update docs example and explanation to show predicate usage.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:42Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:42Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value: {"id":"chai-xtv","title":"Consolidate repetitive VNode tag constructors with generation","description":"`vnode.mbt` contains many near-identical wrappers (`div`, `span`, `h1`, `h2`, ...), each delegating to `el`. This is easy to drift and increases maintenance overhead.\n\nFix direction: generate wrappers from a tag list (script or macro) and keep a single source of truth for supported elements.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:50Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T14:13:50Z"}

new_value: Replaced queue copy/clear loops with index-based draining in app/component runtime
Updated README on_key_down docs to show predicate-based prevent_default usage
Added vnode tag helper generator script and generated wrapper block markers

all steps complete
error_message logic was actually correct; original null check was the right guard. Reviewed and confirmed.
Cannot cache singleton due to MoonBit generic type system - Array types don't unify across type params. Would need unsafe %identity cast for no meaningful gain. Won't fix.
Fixed: component dispatch now uses while loop to re-check queue after clear(), matching app.mbt pattern. Prevents message loss from synchronous cmd dispatches.
Added fast-path pairwise comparison in diff_attrs for same-length attr lists. Avoids Map/HashSet allocation in the common case.
Changed old_key_map from Map to @hashmap.HashMap for O(1) lookups in keyed diff.
Hoisted HTMLElement cast into lazy get_html_el() helper in diff_attrs, avoiding repeated casts per style attr.
Removed 3 redundant length > 0 guards before clear() in app.mbt and component.mbt.
Replaced manual Some/None match with handler(e).map(f) in Attr::map for EventMaybe.
Kept .to_string() since split returns Iter[StringView]; changed char_length() to length() on the converted String.
Inlined remove_unless into remove_unused_component_slots, its only call site.
Extracted a_with_attrs helper shared by link() and hash_link().
Merged boot() into start(), eliminating the after_update callback indirection.
All 12 child issues resolved. 10 fixed, 1 was false positive (error_message bug), 1 won't fix (singleton Cmd::none). Global state issue (chai-3vy) remains open as P4 backlog.

{"notes":"Referenced again by the March 12, 2026 code review.\n\nThis corresponds to the finding that component/app runtime state is global to the package, so multiple start() calls can interfere with each other through shared component_slots, component_counter, and trigger_render."}

Two start() calls corrupt each other. Known limitation - document or address.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-05T18:24:54Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-05T18:24:54Z"}

{"id":"chai-47u.1","title":"Fix start() diffing against pre-existing mount children","description":"app.mbt currently appends the initial vnode to the mount element, but later renders diff the mount parent at child index 0.

If the selector matches a non-empty container, updates patch the wrong DOM node instead of the node Chai mounted.

Affected code:
- app.mbt:36
- app.mbt:72-73

Expected direction:
- track the actual mounted root node, or clear/own the mount container before first render
- add a regression test that mounts into a non-empty container and verifies the second render updates the Chai-owned node","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T21:57:33Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-12T21:57:33Z"}

old_value:
{"id":"chai-47u.6","title":"Add regression test for mounting into a non-empty root container","description":"Backfill a regression test for the mount-container bug tracked in chai-47u.1.

Coverage goal:
- mount Chai into a selector whose container already has child nodes
- trigger a second render
- verify the update patches the Chai-owned node rather than an unrelated pre-existing child

This should fail on the current implementation and pass once the mount ownership bug is fixed.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T23:16:14Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-12T23:16:14Z"}

new_value: start() now replaces mount contents on initial render so Chai owns child index 0 before diffing.
Added Playwright regression covering non-empty mount roots and subsequent updates.
{"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value:
{"id":"chai-47u.2","title":"Refresh component closures and handle wiring on slot reuse","description":"component.mbt reuses existing component slots by calling the stored render closure only. The stored render/update/handle wiring is never refreshed from the latest parent render.

That means a component with the same id keeps stale captured parent data forever, and replacing the Handle for the same id has no effect.

Affected code:
- component.mbt:75-79
- component.mbt:90-117

Expected direction:
- update reused slots with the latest view/update/handle closures before rendering
- add regression tests for changed captured parent data and swapping handles for the same component id","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T21:57:37Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-12T21:57:37Z"}

new_value: {"assignee":"Bikal Gurung","status":"in_progress"}
old_value:
{"id":"chai-47u.7","title":"Backfill component slot reuse regression tests","description":"Add explicit regression coverage for the stale component-slot reuse behavior tracked in chai-47u.2.

Coverage goal:
- re-render a component with the same id but different captured parent data and verify the child sees the latest data
- swap the Handle passed to the same component id and verify Cmd::send targets the latest handle wiring

These cases are currently untested and should become stable unit or browser regressions before the runtime is changed.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T23:16:18Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-12T23:16:18Z"}

new_value: Component slots now refresh update/view/handle behavior on reuse while preserving child model state.
Added white-box regression coverage for stale captured closures and handle swaps on reused component ids.
Component runtime state is now allocated per start() call instead of shared at the package level; added isolation regression coverage.

- attr.mbt:44-50
- README.md:112-120

- decode value from the appropriate form element abstraction instead of assuming HTMLInputElement
- add tests covering input, textarea, and select usage
- align docs with the supported surface if the helper intentionally stays narrower","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"gbikal@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-12T21:57:42Z","created_by":"Bikal Gurung","updated_at":"2026-03-12T21:57:42Z"}
